name: com.donotpetme.cvrfury
description: Non-destructive avatar tooling for ChilloutVR. CVRFury brings VRCFury-style features (Toggles, Full Controller merging, Armature Link, Blendshape Link, Object State, and more) to the ChilloutVR Content Creation Kit (CCK). Configure features as components on your avatar; CVRFury bakes them into the avatar's Advanced Avatar Settings and animators automatically at build/upload time, leaving your source scene untouched.
